instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English में translate करें। अपना answer लिखें, फिर 'Reveal Answer' button दबाएं।

questions.hindi: मेरे पास एक reliable internet connection है।
questions.english: I have a reliable internet connection.

questions.hindi: उस स्कूल के पास smart classrooms हैं।
questions.english: The school has smart classrooms.

questions.hindi: हमारे पास एक welcoming work environment है।
questions.english: We have a welcoming work environment.

questions.hindi: उनके पास एक dedicated R&D team है।
questions.english: They have a dedicated R&D team.

questions.hindi: उस product के पास अच्छी after-sales service है।
questions.english: The product has good after-sales service.

questions.hindi: मैंने कल रात 8 घंटे की नींद ली है।
questions.english: I have slept eight hours last night.

questions.hindi: उसने (लड़की) सारे notes organize कर लिए हैं।
questions.english: She has organized all her notes.

questions.hindi: हमने module testing complete कर लिया है।
questions.english: We have completed module testing.

questions.hindi: वे लोग project के लिए extra hours दे रहे हैं।
questions.english: They have been putting in extra hours for the project.

questions.hindi: मैंने अपनी English में बहुत सुधार किया है।
questions.english: I have improved my English a lot.

questions.hindi: क्या तुमने payment confirm किया है?
questions.english: Have you confirmed the payment?

questions.hindi: क्या उसने (लड़के) कोई certification किया है?
questions.english: Has he done any certification?

questions.hindi: क्या तुम्हारे पास कोई spare key है?
questions.english: Do you have a spare key?

questions.hindi: क्या उनके पास customer feedback system है?
questions.english: Do they have a customer feedback system?

questions.hindi: क्या उस department के पास कोई budget है?
questions.english: Does that department have a budget?

questions.hindi: मेरे पास एक supportive family है।
questions.english: I have a supportive family.

questions.hindi: उसके पास (लड़की) बहुत creative ideas हैं।
questions.english: She has very creative ideas.

questions.hindi: हमारे पास latest software tools हैं।
questions.english: We have the latest software tools.

questions.hindi: उनके पास experienced advisors हैं।
questions.english: They have experienced advisors.

questions.hindi: उस NGO के पास बहुत volunteers हैं।
questions.english: That NGO has many volunteers.

questions.hindi: मैंने कोई भी shortcut नहीं लिया है।
questions.english: I have not taken any shortcuts.

questions.hindi: उसने (लड़के) कोई promise नहीं तोड़ा है।
questions.english: He has not broken any promises.

questions.hindi: हमने किसी को disappoint नहीं किया है।
questions.english: We have not disappointed anyone.

questions.hindi: वे लोग अभी तक नहीं पहुँचे हैं।
questions.english: They have not arrived yet.

questions.hindi: उसने (लड़की) अभी तक कुछ नहीं decide किया है।
questions.english: She has not decided anything yet.

questions.hindi: मेरे पास कोई excuse नहीं है।
questions.english: I don't have any excuse.

questions.hindi: उसके पास (लड़के) कोई clear vision नहीं है।
questions.english: He doesn't have a clear vision.

questions.hindi: हमारे पास extra staff नहीं है।
questions.english: We don't have extra staff.

questions.hindi: उनके पास proper infrastructure नहीं है।
questions.english: They don't have proper infrastructure.

questions.hindi: उस city के पास metro नहीं है।
questions.english: The city doesn't have a metro.

questions.hindi: मैं सोमवार से नया course शुरू करने वाला हूँ।
questions.english: I have been planning to start a new course since Monday.

questions.hindi: वह कई घंटों से एक solution खोज रहा है।
questions.english: He has been looking for a solution for many hours.

questions.hindi: हम पिछले कुछ समय से नई strategy पर काम कर रहे हैं।
questions.english: We have been working on a new strategy for a while.

questions.hindi: वह (लड़की) दो घंटे से किताब पढ़ रही है।
questions.english: She has been reading a book for two hours.

questions.hindi: तुम कब से यह game खेल रहे हो?
questions.english: How long have you been playing this game?
